1. **Nextflow Ambassador** | Seqera, Barcelona, Spain | 2025–Present. Selected from the global bioinformatics community to promote reproducible, scalable workflow development using Nextflow DSL2.

2. **GBD Senior Collaborator** | Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation (IHME), University of Washington | 2025–Present. Contributing analyst to three *Lancet*-family GBD 2023 publications on vaccine coverage, headache burden, and breast cancer burden.

3. **Expert Media Commentary** | The Business Standard, Bangladesh | 2024. Cited as subject-matter expert in two national health features on antibiotic resistance and self-medication practices.
